languages.text: {n}Арбитр застывает, напряженно оглядываясь. Его кибермастиф, метнувшись вперед, становится между вами и остальными членами свиты, будто заслоняя от возможной атаки.{/n} "Происки ксеносов, Вольный Торговец. Я настаиваю на тщательной проверке всех присутствующих прежде, чем мы войдем туда второй раз. Тот, кто способен на подобное, невероятно опасный враг".

traits.locale_text: {n}Арбитр застывает, напряженно оглядываясь. Его кибермастиф, метнувшись вперед, становится между вами и остальными членами свиты, будто заслоняя от возможной атаки.{/n} "Происки ксеносов, Лорд-капитан. Я настаиваю на тщательной проверке всех присутствующих прежде, чем мы войдем туда второй раз. Тот, кто способен на подобное, невероятно опасный враг".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."
languages.original_text: {n}Арбитр застывает, напряженно оглядываясь. Его кибермастиф, метнувшись вперед, становится между вами и остальными членами свиты, будто заслоняя от возможной атаки.{/n} "Происки ксеносов, Вольный Торговец. Я настаиваю на тщательной проверке всех присутствующих прежде, чем мы войдем туда второй раз. Тот, кто способен на подобное, невероятно опасный враг".

I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

languages.text: {n}法务官僵在原地，紧张地环顾四周。他的生化獒犬猛冲上前，拦在你与其余随从之间，像是在为你挡住随时可能袭来的攻击。{/n}“这是异形的阴谋，行商浪人。我建议在我们再次进入之前，对在场的每一个人进行彻底审查。能施展这等手段的敌人，必定极度危险。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

traits.locale_text: {n}法务官僵在原地，紧张地环顾四周。他的生化獒犬猛冲上前，拦在你与其余随从之间，像是在为你挡住随时可能袭来的攻击。{/n}“这是异形的阴谋，行商浪人。我建议在我们再次进入之前，对在场的每一个人进行彻底审查。能施展这等手段的敌人，必定极度危险。”

languages.text: {n}L'arbitrator se fige, dardant des regards inquiets à la ronde. Son cyber-mastiff bondit pour s'interposer entre vous et le reste de votre entourage, comme pour vous protéger d'une éventuelle attaque.{/n} « Encore un coup des xénos, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'insiste pour inspecter de près tous les individus en présence avant que nous entrions une deuxième fois. Quiconque est capable d'une telle supercherie constitue un adversaire extrêmement dangereux. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'arbitrator se fige, dardant des regards inquiets à la ronde. Son cyber-mastiff bondit pour s'interposer entre vous et le reste de votre entourage, comme pour vous protéger d'une éventuelle attaque.{/n} « Encore un coup des xénos, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'insiste pour inspecter de près tous les individus en présence avant que nous entrions une deuxième fois. Quiconque est capable d'une telle supercherie constitue un adversaire extrêmement dangereux. »

languages.text: {n}Yargıcı, endişeyle etrafına bakarak donakalıyor. Siber mastif öne atılıyor ve sanki seni olası bir saldırıdan korumak istermişçesine seninle maiyetin geri kalanı arasında duruyor.{/n} "Zeno entrikaları Hür Tacir. İkinci kez içeri girmeden önce burada bulunan herkesi ihtiyatla incelemekte ısrar ediyorum. Böyle bir şeye kadir olan biri, inanılmaz derecede tehlikeli bir düşmandır."
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yargıcı, endişeyle etrafına bakarak donakalıyor. Siber mastif öne atılıyor ve sanki seni olası bir saldırıdan korumak istermişçesine seninle maiyetin geri kalanı arasında duruyor.{/n} "Zeno entrikaları Hür Tacir. İkinci kez içeri girmeden önce burada bulunan herkesi ihtiyatla incelemekte ısrar ediyorum. Böyle bir şeye kadir olan biri, inanılmaz derecede tehlikeli bir düşmandır."

languages.text: {n}El Arbitrator se queda inmóvil, mirando tensamente a su alrededor. Su cibermastín se adelanta y se interpone entre tu séquito y tú, como si quisiera protegerte de un posible ataque.{/n} «Es una artimaña xenos, Comerciante Independiente. Insisto en estudiar a fondo a todos los presentes antes de volver a entrar. Cualquiera que sea capaz de hacer algo así es un enemigo extremadamente peligroso».
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Arbitrator se queda inmóvil, mirando tensamente a su alrededor. Su cibermastín se adelanta y se interpone entre tu séquito y tú, como si quisiera protegerte de un posible ataque.{/n} «Es una artimaña xenos, Comerciante Independiente. Insisto en estudiar a fondo a todos los presentes antes de volver a entrar. Cualquiera que sea capaz de hacer algo así es un enemigo extremadamente peligroso».

languages.text: {n}Der Arbitrator erstarrt und sieht sich ängstlich um. Sein Cyber-Mastiff stürzt nach vorne und stellt sich zwischen dich und den Rest des Gefolges, als wolle er dich vor einem möglichen Angriff schützen.{/n} "Xenos-Teufeleien, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich bestehe darauf, alle Anwesenden gründlich zu untersuchen, ehe wir ein zweites Mal hineingehen. Wer zu so etwas fähig ist, ist ein unglaublich gefährlicher Gegner."
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Arbitrator erstarrt und sieht sich ängstlich um. Sein Cyber-Mastiff stürzt nach vorne und stellt sich zwischen dich und den Rest des Gefolges, als wolle er dich vor einem möglichen Angriff schützen.{/n} "Xenos-Teufeleien, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich bestehe darauf, alle Anwesenden gründlich zu untersuchen, ehe wir ein zweites Mal hineingehen. Wer zu so etwas fähig ist, ist ein unglaublich gefährlicher Gegner."

languages.text:
{n}仲裁者、周囲を見回し不安げに立ち止まる。彼のサイバー・マスティフが駆け出し、あなたと仲裁者の側近の間を陣取る。まるで、あなたを攻撃から守るように。{/n}
「異星人の陰謀だ、ローグ・トレーダー。我々は二度とこの場所に入る前に、全員を徹底的に調べなければならない。このような行為ができる者は、非常に危険な敵だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator freezes, looking around anxiously. His cyber-mastiff rushes forward and stands between you and the rest of the retinue, as if to shield you from a possible attack.{/n} "Xenos machinations, Rogue Trader. I insist on thoroughly scrutinising everyone present before we enter a second time. Anyone capable of such a thing is an incredibly dangerous enemy."

traits.locale_text:
{n}仲裁者、周囲を見回し不安げに立ち止まる。彼のサイバー・マスティフが駆け出し、あなたと仲裁者の側近の間を陣取る。まるで、あなたを攻撃から守るように。{/n}
「異星人の陰謀だ、ローグ・トレーダー。我々は二度とこの場所に入る前に、全員を徹底的に調べなければならない。このような行為ができる者は、非常に危険な敵だ。」
